MonsterKill.description: Score awarded for killing a monster in arena mode

MonsterDeath.description: Score penalty applied when killed by a monster in arena mode

PlayerDeath.description: Score penalty when killed by another player

PlayerDeathPercent.description: Percentage of score lost on player death

PlayerKill.description: Score awarded for killing another player

PlayerKillPercent.description: Percentage of victim score awarded to killer

Suicide.description: Score penalty for suicide (dying to environment)
